PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^x70FF70^xFFFF77^7^xFFFF77Militant Faith: ^7You want "Cloistered" on Sentinel or constitution. Use my timeless jewel guide if you need help. -- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KpEiG9vwfQU You want "1% increased effect of non-curse auras" The 2nd devotion modifier can be any of the following. Area damage, elemental damage or brand damage. Reduced mana cost of skills can also work (you would want 10% of phys as extra fire damage fractured on your rings instead of mana/mana cost reduction if you get a militant faith with this).
^xFFFF77Spectres:^7 Use dark marionettes, any of them work. They auto revive after 3 seconds.
------------Crafting Guide for Penance Brand^7^7^7---------------- General advice: always check trade before crafting an item, when it's late in the league it might be cheaper if you buy it over crafting.
^xFFFF77Wands:^7 Fracture cast speed on an imbued base (lower int base) 1) Use the fossil combo - corroded/jagged/metallic/shuddering - On average this is 2 tries to hit +1 all 2) Now you have to clean both your prefix and suffix. For suffix you can do "prefix cannot be changed and scour" If you have anyother prefix besides +1 all, then you have to annul (chance to brick) 3) Your wand wand should be "+1 all spell skill gems" and fractured cast speed, with nothing else. 4) craft "can have 3 crafted modifiers" and then "cannot roll attack". Then use harvest bench for "add/remove phys mod" There is a 33% chance your wand bricks here. 5) your wand is now done, craft 3 modifiers again and craft on double damage/spell damage.
^xE05030Option 2:^7 Instead of fossils you can alt/aug spam until +1 all skills (after getting fractured cast speed) While it's still magic, use craicic chimerals in bestiary to imprint. Then regal and annul off the regal mod (50% chance to brick, if it does, use your imprint and make another one) Follow step 3 above
^xFFFF77Helmet:^7^7 Need a double influence archdemon crown (shaper/elder). Buy on trade if it's cheap, if not you just combine a shaper and elder helmet together (only need 1 archdemon) with awakener orb. 1) Spam essence of horror until you hit hypothermia 2) Your suffixes need to be 30% more ele dmg/hypothermia, if you have a third suffix annul 3) Craft "suffixes cannot be changed" and reforge crit, this gives you a 40% chance to hit spell crit, ideally you want 2% or 3% If you hit attack crit you can use orb of dominance in attempt to elevate your hypothermia. 4) Once suffixes are done, you need to metacraft your prefix. Craft flat mana to block and double exalt slam until you hit concetrated effect use wild bristle matron to force on "suffixes cannot be changed" and then scour to clear prefix (cheaper then crafting suffxes cannot be changed from bench) 5) Helmet is now done, you can craft aoe/+1 gems or life.
^xFFFF77Body Armour:^7 Would highly recommend to watch sushis video on double elevated boots (same method) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AI14FVaCv8M Could potentially also recomb this if you have enough knowledge. But follow sushis video until you hit tier 3 or better suppress on the chest with the tech he used. Getting life is just RNG, can always craft it as well. you can also just use a budget explode chest. As long as the chest has explode/spell suppression then it's useable, phyts taken as cold is not mandatory but very strong.
^xFFFF77Gloves: ^7Can make this recombs if you have enough knowledge on it 1) Fracture "increased damage with hits against chilled enemies" on the best es/evasion. (can easily use recombs to move the temple mod onto a better base). 2) Spam any elemental resist essence, until you hit another t1 res. 3) For prefix, either use wild bristle matron to force on suffixes cannot be changed and then reforge life OR use eldritch crafting For eldritch crafting, craft mana to block, use 1 eldritch exalted orb. Take off the crafted mod and use eldritch annulment orb. Repeat until t1 or t2 life.
^xFFFF77Boots: ^7^7Can make this recombs if you have enough knowledge on it 1) Fracture "14% spell suppression" on the best es/evasion base you can afford. 2) Spam any elemental resist essence, until you hit another t1 res. 3) For prefix, either use wild bristle matron to force on suffixes cannot be changed and then reforge life OR use eldritch crafting For eldritch crafting, craft mana to block, use 1 eldritch exalted orb. Take off the crafted mod and use eldritch annulment orb. Repeat until t1 or t2 life. 4) Use wild bristle matron to force on "suffixes cannot be changed" then veiled orb for a 50/50, unveil any movement speed and your boots are done (onslaught on skill is the best).
^xFFFF77Regular Amulet: ^7 I don't recommend to craft this amulet, just buy it if it's cheap. Other alternatives are ashes of the stars or replica dragonfang with +3 skills to penance Maybe doable with recombs but unsure, eitherway dragonfang is pretty similar in performance.
^xFFFF77Focus Amulet:^7 Buy an unsplit focus amulet (can't have the "split' tag on it) 1) Chaos spam until you hit +1 all skills, then annul (33% chance to brick and have to chaos spam again) 2) once you have 2 mods, split the amulet through bestiary. This will make your focus amulet magic. 3) Use craicic chimerals to imprint your amulet (your amulet should just be +1 all skills, you can sell your 2nd amulet from the split). 4) Now you want to regal. If you hit a suffix go to the harvest bench and aug life. If you hit a prefix, then you have to annul. If it's rare with 1 mod, then craft "prefixes cannot be changed" and aug life If your amulet ever bricks from an annulment orb, then use your imprints to return the amulet to the +1 all skills. Keep an extra one in stash in case you mess up. Repeat the steps until you hit t1 or t2 life.
^xFFFF77Ring:^7^7 1) Fracture T1 max life on a vermiliion base. (two-stone is fine if you really need the res). 2) Spam essence of scorn until you hit t1 cast speed OR t1 chaos res. Annul if you have 3 suffixes (need crit multi/chaos res or crit multi/cast speed). 3) Craft suffixes cannot be changed and reforge chaos if you need chaos resist or reforge caster if you need cast speed 4) with suffixes done, use wild bristle matron to force on "suffixes cannot be changed" and then use a veiled orb. Block any flat ele dmg before unveiling.
Kalandra touch isn't needed, if you're short on a res this would be a good spot to craft a different ring to fill out your res.
^xFFFF77Medium Cluster:^7 Check trade first if it's cheap Spam reforge speed with harvest, exalt if you hit either grand deisng or remarkable.
^xFFFF77Doryani cluster jewel:^7 This cluster is not needed for the build. If you want to craft it, then fracture "Corrosive elements" and use fossils or harvest to finish.
^xFFFF77Small cluster:^7 I don't really recommend to craft the small cluster if only 3 prop. Cheapest way would be buying any of mods already fractured and then just chaos spamming or harvest life (use exalt/annul if you hit 2/3 mods) How to craft 4 prop cluster jewel 1) Fracture 6% to all elemental resistances 2) Spam harvest reforge life 3) Use exalts/annuls if you hit 3 out of the 4 mods 4) Corrupt (hope it doesn't brick) and use tainted divine tear drops to finish Can be expensive, don't need a 4 prop small for the budget version.

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Ghoul Sliver Medium Cluster Jewel Unique ID: a973c3711f3326e9ed16c281c1b55edec3d6b0cd8ba21195de8f84f821b9a8a2 Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 5 Passive Skills {crafted}1 Added Passive Skill is a Jewel Socket {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Brand Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +3% to all Elemental Resistances 1 Added Passive Skill is Grand Design 1 Added Passive Skill is Remarkable

Rarity: UNIQUE Watcher's Eye Prismatic Jewel Unique ID: 8556b7765674503cd75d5267a9642dcd3fb2201d8c350aa00dfd46d24b577fdc Item Level: 87 Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 6% increased maximum Energy Shield 6% increased maximum Life 4% increased maximum Mana +1.7% to Critical Strike Chance while affected by Hatred +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage while affected by Grace

Rarity: UNIQUE Militant Faith Timeless Jewel Unique ID: f687fc2cf7a5f7f0c26c2df32bba8bc33c2a49c6d04cf3fa8b9890b22dc9ce77 Item Level: 84 Radius: Large Implicits: 0 Carved to glorify 6528 new faithful converted by High Templar Dominus Passives in radius are Conquered by the Templars 4% increased area damage per 10 Devotion 1% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras per 10 Devotion Historic

Rarity: UNIQUE Unnatural Instinct Viridian Jewel Unique ID: 3c49ec6e4c9a7613c10b91d3fe2f5be4a5038fbc09b2eaaf8b1d0c88541e47ab Item Level: 80 Radius: Small Limited to: 1 Implicits: 1 {tags:bleed,physical,ailment}Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you Allocated Small Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing Grants all bonuses of Unallocated Small Passive Skills in Radius Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Forbidden Flesh Cobalt Jewel Unique ID: 7042164e2610dd90c548ff18cb4bc947c942a84a64429a50d6be2e07bf3f6622 Item Level: 86 Limited to: 1 Requires Class Templar Implicits: 0 Allocates Conviction of Power if you have the matching modifier on Forbidden Flame Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Cataclysm Shard Large Cluster Jewel Unique ID: 9aee04f3fac1a1da80270a25cc3e29bdad8773f5e3ca920ab9dc1c973414da64 Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 8 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Lightning Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +2% to all Elemental Resistances {fractured}1 Added Passive Skill is Corrosive Elements 1 Added Passive Skill is Doryani's Lesson 1 Added Passive Skill is Sadist

Rarity: UNIQUE Impossible Escape Viridian Jewel Unique ID: 7a12f81a96aa3e2aadcf8a6c051e1ac489de813339f241233179c0b6709b2497 Item Level: 87 Radius: Small Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 Passives in Radius of Precise Technique can be Allocated without being connected to your tree Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Brood Hold Vermillion Ring Unique ID: a1c7067f535dd66d3d35803e22f16889bced1afe5ceed6ec07a1d4d123c691e2 Item Level: 86 LevelReq: 80 Implicits: 1 8% increased maximum Life {fractured}+132 to maximum Life 16% increased Cast Speed +25% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier +35% to Chaos Resistance {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -8 to Total Mana Cost +65 to maximum Mana 8% reduced Mana Cost of Skills

Rarity: RARE Glyph Clutches Phantom Mitts Evasion: 292 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.8628 Energy Shield: 58 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.8862 Unique ID: 200cdb75c8e47d1a90c43afbf40f43fe08733fd244fe9aa7803e5822609d91dd Item Level: 86 Quality: 26 Sockets: G-B-R-B LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 25% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage Freezes you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.4 metres +125 to maximum Life +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage {fractured}+46% to Cold Resistance {fractured}50% increased Damage with Hits against Chilled Enemies +46% to lightning resistance {crafted}25% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage

Rarity: MAGIC Surgeon's Quicksilver Flask of the Order Unique ID: 1966fe09459baa2c295ca6fbc7b741733785f85653c9fbe72cfd8bcb6c28fe9c Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 35% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike {crafted}Regenerate 3% of Life per second during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Experimenter's Jade Flask of the Impala Unique ID: 3e625f19325ddbe5ccdbc82073bfb540b2807ea2711a6fea30ea088b2c699c84 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 40% increased Duration 57% increased Evasion Rating during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Panicked Divine Life Flask of the Cure Unique ID: 92ed13713cf3667aa5d44f3dc517752162092c6acc716cd18516b45635c79cf9 Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 0 13% reduced Amount Recovered Instant Recovery when on Low Life Grants Immunity to Poison for 13 seconds if used while Poisoned

Rarity: UNIQUE Oriath's End Bismuth Flask Unique ID: 4a79b264d777bd47a7888a4e1f4bb3261b64a80bb26896a9600f2f0b78d29fbb Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 56 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 38% increased Charge Recovery Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 30% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element

Rarity: RARE Hypnotic Torc Focused Amulet Unique ID: 92c21e02a4c4981d12064ea9fcdd343f9232f72a2c6690e5e6fdb39ca11ab3b5 Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 5 {crafted}Allocates Charisma -1 Prefix Modifier allowed -2 Suffix Modifiers allowed Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed 100% increased Explicit Modifier magnitudes +281 to maximum Life +2 to Level of all Skill Gems {crafted}+2 to Minimum Frenzy Charges Split
Rarity: UNIQUE Kalandra's Touch Ring Unique ID: cdae644b837fbc34381fc11753f73c6dc8e354958d4183264eaa18ae713db07f Item Level: 85 Implicits: 0 Reflects your other Ring

Rarity: UNIQUE Progenesis Amethyst Flask Unique ID: fc7f4b67770c73857e51c49da9ee5078f77619230be2ad072f619d8a655229c6 Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 16% reduced Charges per use 33% increased Duration When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead

Rarity: RARE Behemoth Essence Medium Cluster Jewel Item Level: 70 LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 5 Passive Skills {crafted}1 Added Passive Skill is a Jewel Socket {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Brand Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +3% to all Elemental Resistances 1 Added Passive Skill is Grand Design 1 Added Passive Skill is Remarkable

Rarity: UNIQUE Headhunter Leather Belt League: Nemesis Catalyst: Intrinsic CatalystQuality: 20 LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 1 {tags:life}{range:1}+(25-40) to maximum Life {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.561}+(40-55) to Strength {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:1}+(40-55) to Dexterity {tags:life}{range:1}+(50-60) to maximum Life {range:0.5}(20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

Rarity: RARE Mind Dome Archdemon Crown Armour: 233 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.3395 Energy Shield: 48 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.4 Unique ID: 1d29ffd406d76393db23848111dfa860f31e1daa008ed175d6d89d16862c2656 Shaper Item Elder Item Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-R-B LevelReq: 75 Implicits: 3 -2 to Level of Socketed Support Gems +2 to Level of Socketed Skill Gems Item sells for much more to vendors Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Concentrated Effect Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 18 Hypothermia Socketed Gems deal 30% more Elemental Damage Socketed Spells have +3% to Critical Strike Chance 23% increased Area Damage 15% increased Effect of Cold Ailments {crafted}+1 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems {crafted}10% increased Area of Effect

Rarity: RARE New Item Imbued Wand Crafted: true Prefix: None Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 59 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Haunted by Tormented Spirits {tags:caster_damage,damage,caster}{range:1}(33-37)% increased Spell Damage {fractured}32% increased Cast Speed +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems +1 to Level of all Physical Spell Skill Gems {crafted}Can have up to 3 Crafted Modifiers {crafted}48% increased Spell Damage {crafted}5% chance to deal Double Damage {crafted}Gain 5% of Non-Chaos Damage as extra Chaos Damage
